The '''JG-8 landspeeder''' was a luxury [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] model manufactured by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] during the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

Although the JG-8 was prized for its ornate bodywork, it was considered to be an impractical model due to its lack of maneuverability. The JG-8, measuring 6.2 meters long, could carry a single [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and two passengers. It was controlled via a steering vane located at the front of the craft, with two engines—one at the base of the speeder, the other atop a fin—at the rear.

It came equipped with passenger restraint webbing and a specially tuned [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] to provide continuous gravity to the passenger compartment to prevent them from falling out if the landspeeder is upside down.<ref name="goi">''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]''</ref>
